misconceptions.description: Things I got wrong that need correction

entries.whatIGotWrong: Confused about dotfiles structure and symlink setup
entries.correction: The opencode config lives in ~/Code/shell/dotfiles/opencode/.opencode/ NOT directly in ~/Code/shell/dotfiles/opencode/. The install.sh symlinks individual files from .opencode/ subdirectory to ~/.config/opencode/

entries.context: When making changes to opencode configuration files
entries.whatIGotWrong: Made changes to opencode config files but didn't run install.sh, commit, and push
entries.correction: Always run install.sh to update symlinks, then commit and push changes to dotfiles repo so symlinks remain correct and OpenCode can pick up changes

steps: 4. Commit changes: git add -A && git commit -m 'config: description'
details.critical: Must run install.sh after adding new directories (skills, learnings, etc.) or OpenCode won't see them
